angle: A short video showing guest messages being answered on their own, in the host's voice, so the whole exchange resolves itself and leaves a warm feeling of reassurance. Dark scene, light phone.
brief: Remotion motion piece on the animated-messages composition, dark variant: the scene background and the headline / CTA go dark while the phone and its chat stay light, so the light device glows on a dark ground. Two guests flip, each asks a question, Hostie replies, then the headline becomes Join Hububb. The in-chat copy is reproduced UI, not marketing copy. pillar: runs-itself, funnel: reach.

copy.headline: Guest messages answered by AI
copy.subhead: Hostie replies in your voice, day and night, so no one is left waiting and you are never on call.

cta.line: All your messages answered for you
